# comfyui_node_schema (Data Source)

Retrieves the generated structured schema contract for a specific ComfyUI node type.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `node_type` (String) The ComfyUI node type to look up (e.g., KSampler).

### Read-Only

- `category` (String) Category the node belongs to.
- `deprecated` (Boolean) Whether this node is deprecated.
- `description` (String) Description of the node.
- `display_name` (String) Display name of the node.
- `experimental` (Boolean) Whether this node is experimental.
- `hidden_inputs` (Attributes List) Structured hidden input contracts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--hidden_inputs))
- `optional_inputs` (Attributes List) Structured optional input contracts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--optional_inputs))
- `output_node` (Boolean) Whether this is an output node.
- `outputs` (Attributes List) Structured output slot contracts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--outputs))
- `required_inputs` (Attributes List) Structured required input contracts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--required_inputs))
- `terraform_type` (String) Canonical generated Terraform resource type for this node.

<a id="nestedatt--hidden_inputs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `hidden_inputs`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--optional_inputs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `optional_inputs`

Read-Only:

- `default_value` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `dynamic_options` (Boolean)
- `dynamic_options_source` (String)
- `enum_values` (List of String)
- `has_default_value` (Boolean)
- `has_max_value` (Boolean)
- `has_min_value` (Boolean)
- `has_step_value` (Boolean)
- `inventory_kind` (String)
- `is_link_type` (Boolean)
- `max_value` (String)
- `min_value` (String)
- `multiline` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `step_value` (String)
- `supports_strict_plan_validation` (Boolean)
- `tooltip` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `validation_kind` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--outputs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `outputs`

Read-Only:

- `is_list` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `slot_index` (Number)
- `type` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--required_inputs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `required_inputs`

Read-Only:

- `default_value` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `dynamic_options` (Boolean)
- `dynamic_options_source` (String)
- `enum_values` (List of String)
- `has_default_value` (Boolean)
- `has_max_value` (Boolean)
- `has_min_value` (Boolean)
- `has_step_value` (Boolean)
- `inventory_kind` (String)
- `is_link_type` (Boolean)
- `max_value` (String)

- `multiline` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
